title: `Ammiyshadday #5996
definition:
Ammishaddai = "my kinsman is Almighty"

 1) father of Ahiezer, prince of the tribe of Dan at the time of
    the exodus
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ammishaddai = "my kinsman is Almighty"

 1) father of Ahiezer, prince of the tribe of Dan at the time of
    the exodus

    NASB:  my kinsman is Shaddai, a Danite
